description: Honk the noses of 10 Clowns.
hint: Melee shove 10 clown zombies. Aim for the face to trigger the 'honk' sound.

description: Using a Molotov, burn a Clown leading at least 10 Common Infected.
hint: Wait until a clown is leading a large horde with its squeaky shoes, then throw a Molotov directly into the group.

description: Kill a Charger with a melee weapon while they are charging.
hint: Use a sharp, high-damage melee weapon like an Axe or Katana. Time your swing perfectly just as a charging Charger reaches you.

description: Kill a Spitter before she is able to spit.
hint: Listen for the Spitter's high-pitched squeal. Snipe her instantly with a rifle or sniper before she finishes her attack animation.

description: Finish a campaign using only melee weapons.
hint: Equip a melee weapon immediately. Do not shoot any firearms at all. Throwables and medkits are allowed.

description: Kill one of each Uncommon Infected.
hint: Kill a Riot cop (Parish), Mudman (Swamp Fever), Clown (Carnival), Worker (Hard Rain), and Hazmat (Dead Center). Unlocks over normal gameplay.

description: Kill a Jockey within 2 seconds of it jumping on a Survivor.
hint: Shoot or shove a Jockey immediately when you see it land on a teammate's head.

description: Decapitate 200 Infected with a melee weapon.
hint: Aim high at the neck/head with a sharp melee weapon (Axe, Katana, Machete) when fighting hordes.

description: In a Versus round, leave the saferoom to defibrillate a dead teammate.
hint: In Versus, grab a defib from the saferoom. If a teammate dies outside, leave, revive them, and safely return before the round ends.

description: Survive all campaigns on Expert.
hint: Beat all five original L4D2 campaigns on Expert. Use corners, teamwork, stick to melee for commons, and save throwables for Tanks.

description: Survive a campaign on Expert skill with Realism mode enabled.
hint: Realism removes glowing outlines and makes zombies tougher. Play Dead Center, communicate heavily, and move quickly.

description: Form a team and beat an enemy team in 4v4 Versus or Scavenge.
hint: You need a full lobby of 8 players (4 on your team) to start a team Versus or Scavenge match. Win the game.

description: Kill 10 swampy Mudmen while they are in the water.
hint: In Swamp Fever, look for the fast Mudmen zombies crawling in the murky water and shoot them before they reach dry land.

description: Collect 10 vials of Boomer vomit from infected CEDA agents you have killed.
hint: Kill CEDA Hazmat zombies in Dead Center. Some will drop green Bile Bombs on death. Pick up 10 of them across your playthroughs.

description: Kill 15 Infected with a single grenade launcher blast.
hint: Find a Grenade Launcher, wait for a Boomer bile or pipe bomb to group up a massive horde, and fire directly into the center.

description: Ignite 50 Common Infected with incendiary ammo.
hint: Deploy an incendiary ammo pack (red box), load it, and shoot 50 zombies. Unlocks easily over natural gameplay.

description: Deploy an ammo upgrade and have your team use it.
hint: Equip an explosive or incendiary ammo pack (found throughout levels), deploy it on the ground, and have a teammate pick some up.

description: Revive 10 dead Survivors with the defibrillator.
hint: Use the Defibrillator item to revive completely dead teammates 10 times. Can be farmed with bots on higher difficulties.

description: Revive 10 incapacitated Survivors while under the speed-boosting effects of adrenaline.
hint: When a teammate is downed, take an Adrenaline shot first, then revive them. Repeat 10 times.

description: Kill 100 Common Infected with the chainsaw.
hint: Find a Chainsaw (occupies melee slot) and use it exclusively on hordes until you hit 100 kills.

description: Use a bile bomb on a Tank.
hint: Throw a Bile Bomb directly onto a Tank to coat it, causing the horde to attack it.

description: Use every melee weapon to kill Common Infected.
hint: Get at least one kill with the Frying Pan, Bat, Axe, Katana, Machete, Crowbar, Cricket Bat, Guitar, Tonfa (Nightstick), and Golf Club.

description: Kill a Tank with melee weapons.
hint: Play on Easy. Have all 4 players equip melee weapons, corner the Tank, and hack away. It will die in just a few hits.

description: Cross the bridge finale in less than three minutes.
hint: Pop adrenaline and rush the bridge on Easy difficulty. Ignore most zombies and Tanks, just keep running for the rescue chopper.

description: Survive the Dead Center campaign.
hint: Complete the Dead Center campaign on any difficulty.

description: Survive the Dark Carnival campaign.
hint: Complete the Dark Carnival campaign on any difficulty.

description: Survive the Swamp Fever campaign.
hint: Complete the Swamp Fever campaign on any difficulty.

description: Survive the Hard Rain campaign.
hint: Complete the Hard Rain campaign on any difficulty.

description: Survive the Parish campaign.
hint: Complete The Parish campaign on any difficulty.

description: Navigate the impound lot and reach the cemetery safe room without tripping any alarms.
hint: In The Parish Chapter 3, do not shoot or touch any cars with blinking red alarms. Watch your fire closely.

description: Rescue Gnome Chompski from the Carnival.
hint: Score 750 on the Peanut Butter Box shooting minigame in Chapter 2. Pick up the Gnome and carry him all the way to the rescue chopper.

description: Navigate the sugar mill and reach the safe room without killing any Witches.
hint: In Hard Rain Chapter 2, there are many Witches. Do not shoot or startle them. Walk slowly, turn off flashlights, and take long detours.

description: Defend yourself at the crashed airliner without taking damage.
hint: During the Dead Air finale, stay behind cover in the far back corner. Let your teammates or bots do the fighting so you don't take a single hit.

description: As the Jockey, ride a Survivor for more than 12 seconds.
hint: In Versus, jump on a survivor who strays far from their team, or wait until a horde distracts the others, then steer them into a corner.

description: As the Jockey, ride the Survivors twice in a single life.
hint: In Versus, ride a survivor, let their teammate shove you off (don't get killed), run away to hide, wait for your cooldown, and jump on someone again.

description: As the Jockey, ride a Survivor and steer them into a Spitter's acid patch.
hint: Coordinate with a Spitter teammate in Versus. Once they spit, steer the survivor directly into the glowing green acid pool.

description: As the Spitter, hit every Survivor with a single acid patch.
hint: Wait until the survivors are huddled in a small room, elevator, or saferoom door, then spit right in the middle to hit all four at once.

display_name: A SPITTLE HELP FROM MY FRIENDS
description: As the Spitter, spit on a Survivor being choked by a Smoker.
hint: In Versus, wait for a Smoker teammate to pull a survivor, then spit your acid directly onto that trapped survivor.

description: As the Charger, bowl through the entire enemy team in a single charge.
hint: Wait for survivors to line up in a narrow hallway or bridge (like in The Parish). Charge straight down the middle to bowl over all four.

description: As the Charger, grab a Survivor and smash them into the ground for a solid 15 seconds.
hint: Grab a survivor who is lagging far behind the rest of the team so you aren't immediately killed by the other players.

description: As the Charger, grab a Survivor and carry them over 80 feet.
hint: Find a very long straightaway (like the Dead Center hotel hallways or The Parish bridge) and charge from maximum distance.

description: In a Survival round, get a medal only using melee weapons.
hint: Get a Bronze medal (4 minutes) using ONLY melee weapons. Camp in a tight corner with your team so infected come right to your swings.

description: Win a game of Scavenge.
hint: Play the Scavenge multiplayer mode and win a match. You may need friends to populate a lobby since the mode is older.

description: Collect 100 gas cans in Scavenge.
hint: Play Scavenge mode and pour a total of 100 gas cans. This cumulates across all your games over time.

description: Collect 15 gas cans in a single Scavenge round.
hint: In one round of Scavenge, successfully gather and pour 15 gas cans into the generator. Play against bots or uncoordinated teams.

description: Stop the enemy team from collecting any gas cans during a Scavenge round.
hint: Play as infected in Scavenge and aggressively defend the generator/cans so the survivor team scores zero before time runs out.

description: Prove you are stronger than Moustachio.
hint: In Dark Carnival Chapter 4, use an adrenaline shot and hit the Strongman bell game with a melee weapon to break it.

description: Make a Survivor drop a gas can during overtime.
hint: In Scavenge, when the timer hits 0 but a survivor is holding a can (Overtime), attack them as an infected to make them drop it, ending the round.

description: Cause 25 gas can drops as a Special Infected.
hint: In Scavenge, attack survivors carrying gas cans (e.g., shoot them or pounce them) to force them to drop the can. Do this 25 times.

description: Prove you are faster than Moustachio.
hint: In Dark Carnival Chapter 4, play the Whack-a-Mole game in the arcade. Quickly hit enough moles to reach a score of 42.

description: Survive The Passing Campaign.
hint: Complete The Passing campaign on any difficulty.

description: As the Charger, grab a Survivor and crash them through 8 chairs at the wedding.
hint: In The Passing Chapter 1, find the park area with the wedding setup. Grab a survivor and charge them straight through the rows of folding chairs.

description: Using the M60, kill 25 infected without letting go of the trigger.
hint: Find the M60 machine gun (frequently found in The Passing). Wait for a large horde, hold down the fire button, and sweep across them without letting go.

description: Collect 10 items dropped by a Fallen Survivor.
hint: Kill the 'Fallen Survivor' uncommon infected (who runs away from you). Collect the medkits, pills, or pipe bombs they drop. Cumulates over time.

description: Play 6 Mutations.
hint: Play 6 different Mutation game modes from the main menu. You just need to start the matches.

description: Knock off the heads of 18 infected with the golf club.
hint: Find a Golf Club (often in The Passing) and aim slightly upwards at the heads of infected to decapitate them.

display_name: KILLING THEM SWIFTLY TO THIS SONG
description: Play the new Midnight Riders song on a jukebox.
hint: In any campaign with a Jukebox (like The Parish Chapter 2 or Swamp Fever Chapter 1), interact with it until it plays the Midnight Riders track.

description: Kill a Tank only with damage from the original Survivors.
hint: During The Passing finale, run away from the Tank and let the original L4D1 survivors shooting from the balcony kill it for you.

description: Open 5 foot lockers.
hint: Open 5 different metal footlockers (which contain health/throwables) scattered throughout The Passing campaign.

description: Play 5 full games of Scavenge on The Port.
hint: Play 5 full matches of the Scavenge mode on 'The Port' map (The Passing finale).

description: Complete "The Sacrifice".
hint: Complete The Sacrifice campaign on any difficulty.

description: Have Bill sacrifice himself for the team.
hint: During the finale, when someone needs to restart the generator, ensure the player controlling Bill does it.

description: Kill a Special Infected with an exploding barrel.
hint: Shoot one of the red explosive barrels when a Special Infected is standing near it.

description: Have all 3 generators running at once in "The Sacrifice" finale.
hint: During the finale, have three players press the button on all three generators at the exact same time.

description: As a Special Infected, incap someone who is trying to sacrifice themselves.
hint: In Versus, wait until a survivor goes down to restart the final generator, then incapacitate them as a Special Infected.

description: Survive the Cold Stream campaign on any difficulty.
hint: Complete the Cold Stream campaign.

description: Play a Versus game on Dead Air from start to finish.
hint: Join a Versus lobby for Dead Air and play through the entire campaign without leaving.

description: Collect three gifts dropped by Special Infected in Versus Mode.
hint: During holiday events (December), Special Infected drop gifts when killed. Collect three of them.

description: Plays games with free weekend players and helps them survive a campaign.
hint: Only unlockable during official Steam 'Free Weekends' by playing with someone who does not own the game.

description: Spread cheer by helping a free holiday player survive a campaign.
hint: Similar to Good Guy Nick, this requires playing with new free players during specific holiday events.

description: Earn a bronze medal on any official Survival map.
hint: Survive for 4 minutes in Survival mode. Pick a highly defensible map like Dead Center Mall.

description: Earn a silver medal on any official survival map.
hint: Survive for 7 minutes in Survival mode.

display_name: THIS IS WHERE THE FUN BEGINS
description: Earn a gold medal on any official survival map.
hint: Survive for 10 minutes in Survival mode. Requires solid teamwork and funneling enemies into choke points.

description: Survive The Last Stand campaign on any difficulty.
hint: Complete The Last Stand campaign.

description: Survive The Last Stand campaign on Expert Realism.
hint: Extremely difficult. No glowing outlines and high damage. Rely on Bile Bombs for the finale and communicate flawlessly.

description: Find the golden crowbars hidden in the Left 4 Dead 1 survival maps.
hint: Load up L4D1 survival maps in L4D2 and find the hidden golden crowbars (usually tucked in obscure corners or slightly out of bounds).

description: Revive an incapacitated teammate while a Tank is nearby.
hint: When a Tank spawns, let a teammate go down. Have another teammate kite the Tank away while you revive the downed player.

description: As the Spitter, spit on a Survivor who is pinned by a Charger.
hint: In Versus, coordinate with a Charger. Once they pin and start pounding a survivor, spit directly onto them.

description: As the Spitter, spit on a Survivor who is pinned by a Hunter.
hint: In Versus, coordinate with a Hunter. Once they pounce and pin a survivor, spit directly onto them.

description: Destroy 20 gascans as the Spitter.
hint: In Scavenge mode (or the Dead Center finale), spit on the yellow gas cans the survivors drop to destroy them.

description: Instantly kill a Survivor as the Charger.
hint: In Versus, charge a survivor completely off a fatal edge (like out the window in Dead Air or off the hotel roof in Dead Center).

description: As the Boomer, vomit on a Survivor without having direct line of sight with them.
hint: In Versus, aim upwards and vomit in an arc over a wall, or vomit through a small crack/ceiling hole so it splashes onto a survivor.

description: Rescue three Survivors from a single rescue closet.
hint: Let 3 teammates die. Once they all respawn together in the same rescue closet ahead, open the door.

description: With a sharp melee weapon, cut a Smoker's tongue before he ensnares you.
hint: Equip a sharp weapon (Axe, Katana, Machete). When a Smoker shoots its tongue at you, time your swing perfectly to cut it mid-air.

description: Kill a pouncing Hunter with a shotgun.
hint: When a Hunter leaps towards you, shoot him mid-air with a shotgun for an instant kill. Requires good timing.

description: Destroy a Tank's rock in mid-air.
hint: When a Tank throws a concrete rock at you, shoot the rock with a shotgun or assault rifle to break it before it hits you.

description: Kill the Witch bride with a single shotgun blast on expert difficulty.
hint: In The Passing Chapter 1 (Expert), sneak up behind the Witch in the wedding dress with a Tier 2 Shotgun and blast her point-blank in the head.

description: As the Hunter, land a 25 damage pounce.
hint: In Versus, find a very high point (like the No Mercy hospital roof) and pounce off it onto a survivor far below. Maximum damage is 25.

description: Kill 20 Jockeys with the shovel or pitchfork.
hint: Equip a shovel or pitchfork (commonly found in Swamp Fever or Hard Rain) and hit Jockeys. Cumulates over time.

description: Survive for 10 minutes on any official map in Versus Survival.
hint: Requires coordinated defense against player-controlled infected in Versus Survival mode.

description: Kill 53,599 infected. You made sure the dead won't rise anymore!
hint: This is a lifetime achievement that unlocks naturally as you play the game over many hours.

description: Escape Liberty Mall's Atrium before the first Tank appears
hint: In the Dead Center finale, pre-drop all the gas cans near the car before pouring them. Once you start pouring, do it quickly before the Tank spawns.

description: Discover the hidden room in the Last Stand campaign
hint: Look up a guide for the secret developer room in The Last Stand (requires finding and bringing specific items/keys to a hidden door).

description: Earn a bronze medal on every official survival map
hint: Survive for 4 minutes on all original L4D2 survival maps.

description: Earn a silver medal on every official survival map.
hint: Survive for 7 minutes on all original L4D2 survival maps.

description: Earn a gold medal on every official survival map.
hint: Survive for 10 minutes on all original L4D2 survival maps. Requires elite teamwork and deep map knowledge.

description: Survive for 30 minutes on any official survival map.
hint: The easiest maps for this are typically ones with indestructible camping spots or tight funnels where zombies can't spawn behind you.

description: Kill a Witch using only a sharp melee weapon, without anyone getting incapacitated or killed.
hint: Best done on Easy by having all 4 players rush a Witch simultaneously with Katanas/Axes to kill her instantly.

description: On the concert finale, survive until the helicopter arrives without leaving the stage
hint: Stay strictly on the concert stage (the wooden platform) for the entire finale. Do not run up into the stadium bleachers.

description: Complete The Last Stand campaign in 13 minutes or less, without any Survivors dying.
hint: Speedrun the campaign on Easy. Ignore exploration, use adrenaline to bypass hordes, and don't let anyone bleed out.

description: If you are reading this achievement, Gabe Newell has successfully launched Gnome Chompski into space.
hint: This unlocked automatically for all players when Valve sent a real Gnome Chompski to space via Rocket Lab in 2020.
